includes 3 elements:
  • siteName:string - {site name}
  • siteVertical:string - {sub vertical}
  • siteNameV2:string - current platform, ie: "v3"
Example: "scData": {

siteName: "bathremodelspecialists.com",

siteVertical: "hs_br",

siteNameV2: "v3."}
